 20822:     function criticalMissionValueDetails(entry) {
 20823:         if (entry?.valueDetails && Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(entry.valueDetails, 'value')) return entry.valueDetails;
 20824:         const missionId = normaliseMissionId(entry?.missionId);
 20825:         const marker = entry?.marker || entry?.snapshot?.marker || null;
 20826:         const liveMarkerValue = exactCreditFromObject(marker);
 20827:         if (liveMarkerValue !== null) return { value: liveMarkerValue, source: 'live marker' };
 20828:         const snapshotValue = parseCreditValue(entry?.snapshot?.averageCredits);
 20829:         if (snapshotValue !== null) return { value: snapshotValue, source: 'mission snapshot' };
 20830:         const overlayValue = missionId === null ? null : parseCreditValue(missionOverlayData.get(missionId)?.averageCredits);
 20831:         if (overlayValue !== null) return { value: overlayValue, source: 'captured mission data' };
 20832:         const entryValue = parseCreditValue(entry?.averageCredits);

 20829:         if (snapshotValue !== null) return { value: snapshotValue, source: 'mission snapshot' };
 20830:         const overlayValue = missionId === null ? null : parseCreditValue(missionOverlayData.get(missionId)?.averageCredits);
 20831:         if (overlayValue !== null) return { value: overlayValue, source: 'captured mission data' };
 20832:         const entryValue = parseCreditValue(entry?.averageCredits);
 20833:         if (entryValue !== null) return { value: entryValue, source: 'watcher record' };
 20834:         const panelValue = missionId === null ? null : creditsFromMissionPanel(missionId);
 20835:         if (panelValue !== null) return { value: panelValue, source: 'mission list' };
 20836:         return { value: null, source: 'unavailable' };
 20837:     }

 20843:     function criticalValueEligible(entry) {
 20844:         return selectedCriticalValueMode() === 'total' || Boolean(entry?.eligibleForCredits);

 20843:     function criticalValueEligible(entry) {

 20846: 
 20847:     function criticalValueGroup(entries, predicate = () => true) {
 20848:         let total = 0;
 20849:         let known = 0;
 20850:         let unknown = 0;

 20850:         let unknown = 0;
 20851:         let eligible = 0;
 20852:         const seenMissionIds = new Set();
 20853:         const sources = new Map();
 20854:         for (const entry of entries) {
 20855:             if (!predicate(entry) || !criticalValueEligible(entry)) continue;
 20856:             const missionId = normaliseMissionId(entry?.missionId);
 20857:             if (missionId !== null && seenMissionIds.has(missionId)) continue;
 20858:             if (missionId !== null) seenMissionIds.add(missionId);
 20859:             if (entry?.eligibleForCredits) eligible += 1;
 20860:             const details = criticalMissionValueDetails(entry);
 20861:             const value = details.value;
 20862:             if (value === null || !Number.isFinite(Number(value))) {
 20863:                 unknown += 1;
 20864:                 continue;
 20865:             }
 20866:             total += Math.max(0, Number(value) || 0);
 20867:             known += 1;
 20868:             sources.set(details.source, (sources.get(details.source) || 0) + 1);
 20869:         }
 20870:         return { total: Math.round(total), known, unknown, eligible, count: seenMissionIds.size, sources };

 16727:     function collectTransportSweepVehicleCandidates() {

 16729:         let anchors = root ? transportSweepVehicleAnchorsWithin(root) : [];

 16566:     function transportSweepFindMissionWindowRoot(missionId = null) {
 16567:         const roots = transportSweepVisibleWindowRoots();
 16568:         let best = null;
 16569:         let bestScore = -1;
 16570:         for (const root of roots) {
 16571:             const score = transportSweepRootScore(root, missionId);
 16572:             if (score > bestScore) {
 16573:                 best = root;
 16574:                 bestScore = score;
 16575:             }
 16576:         }

 16576:         }
 16577:         if (best) return best;
 16578: 
 16579:         // Fallback for MissionChief builds that render lightbox content without a stable wrapper.
 16580:         const baseline = transportSweepRuntime.missionAnchorBaseline;
 16581:         const anchor = transportSweepVisibleVehicleAnchors().find(item => !(baseline instanceof Set) || !baseline.has(item));
 16582:         if (!anchor) return null;
 16583:         return anchor.closest?.('#lightbox_box, #lightbox, .lightbox_content, .modal-content, [role="dialog"], .ui-dialog-content') || anchor.ownerDocument?.body || anchor.parentElement;
 16584:     }
 16585: 
 16586:     function transportSweepAnchorBelongsToMissionWindow(anchor) {
 16587:         if (!anchor || !transportSweepAnchorUsable(anchor)) return false;
 16588:         const root = transportSweepRuntime.missionWindowRoot;
 16589:         if (root?.isConnected && root.contains(anchor)) return true;
 16590:         const baseline = transportSweepRuntime.missionAnchorBaseline;
 16591:         if (baseline instanceof Set && !baseline.has(anchor)) return true;
 16592:         return transportSweepVisibleWindowRoots().some(windowRoot => windowRoot.contains(anchor));
 16593:     }

 16796:     async function openTransportSweepVehicle(candidate) {
 16797:         if (transportSweepRuntime.stopRequested || !candidate?.href) return null;
 16798:         transportSweepRuntime.vehicleButtonBaseline = new Set(transportSweepVisibleDischargeButtons());
 16799:         const beforeRoots = transportSweepVisibleWindowRoots();
 16800:         const beforeText = beforeRoots.map(root => String(root.textContent || '').trim()).join('|');
 16801: 
 16802:         let anchor = candidate.anchor;
 16803:         if (!anchor?.isConnected) {
 16804:             const root = transportSweepRuntime.missionWindowRoot?.isConnected ? transportSweepRuntime.missionWindowRoot : document;
 16805:             anchor = Array.from(root.querySelectorAll?.('a[href*="/vehicles/"]') || []).find(item => transportSweepVehicleIdFromHref(item.getAttribute('href')) === String(candidate.vehicleId));
 16806:         }
 16807: 
 16808:         let usedMissionClick = false;
 16809:         if (anchor?.isConnected) {
 16810:             try {
 16811:                 anchor.scrollIntoView?.({ block: 'nearest', inline: 'nearest' });
 16812:                 anchor.click();
 16813:                 usedMissionClick = true;
 16814:             } catch (err) {}

 16939:         transportSweepRuntime.stopRequested = false;
 16940:         transportSweepRuntime.currentMissionId = null;
 16941:         transportSweepRuntime.currentVehicleHref = '';
 16942:         transportSweepRuntime.cleared = 0;
 16943:         transportSweepRuntime.skipped = 0;
 16944:         transportSweepRuntime.errors = 0;
 16945:         transportSweepRuntime.processed = 0;
 16946:         transportSweepRuntime.rejectedOwn = 0;
 16947:         transportSweepRuntime.missionAnchorBaseline = new Set();
 16948:         transportSweepRuntime.vehicleButtonBaseline = new Set();
 16949:         transportSweepRuntime.missionWindowRoot = null;
 16950:         transportSweepRuntime.lastCandidateStats = null;
 16951:         transportSweepRuntime.log = [];
 16952:         renderTransportSweepPanel();
 16953:         transportSweepLog(`Sweep started: ${queue.length} missions, maximum ${state.transportSweep.maxPerRun} requests`);
 16954:         try {
 16955:             for (const item of queue) {
 16956:                 if (transportSweepRuntime.stopRequested || transportSweepRuntime.cleared >= state.transportSweep.maxPerRun) break;
 16957:                 const remaining = state.transportSweep.maxPerRun - transportSweepRuntime.cleared;
 16958:                 await processTransportSweepMission(item, remaining);
 16959:                 if (!transportSweepRuntime.stopRequested) await transportSweepSleep(state.transportSweep.delayMs);

### iframe · 2 matches
 16471:     }
 16472: 
 16473:     function transportSweepDocumentContexts() {
 16474:         const contexts = [];
 16475:         const seenDocuments = new Set();
 16476:         const visit = (doc, label = 'top') => {
 16477:             if (!doc || seenDocuments.has(doc)) return;
 16478:             seenDocuments.add(doc);
 16479:             contexts.push({ doc, label });
 16480:             let frames = [];
 16481:             try { frames = Array.from(doc.querySelectorAll('iframe, frame')); } catch (err) {}
 16482:             frames.forEach((frame, index) => {
 16483:                 try {
 16484:                     const child = frame.contentDocument || frame.contentWindow?.document;
 16485:                     if (child) visit(child, `${label}/frame${index + 1}`);
 16486:                 } catch (err) {
 16487:                     // Cross-origin frames are intentionally ignored.
 16488:                 }
 16489:             });
 16490:         };
 16491:         visit(document);

 28376:     function scheduleDeferredOperationalStartup(delay = STARTUP_OPERATIONAL_DELAY_MS) {
 28377:         if (operationalStartupStarted || runtime.destroyed) return;
 28378:         runtimeSetTimeout(() => runtimeRunWhenIdle(() => {
 28379:             runDeferredOperationalStartup().catch(err => {
 28380:                 operationalStartupComplete = true;
 28381:                 startupDataPassActive = false;
 28382:                 console.debug(`[${SCRIPT.name}] Deferred startup recovered after an operational initialisation error.`, err);
 28383:                 connectMainMutationObserver();
 28384:             });
 28385:         }, STARTUP_IDLE_TIMEOUT_MS), Math.max(0, Number(delay) || 0));
 28386:     }

 28617:     function installAutoLoadAllVehicles() {
 28618:         if (!state.autoLoadAllVehicles || runtime.destroyed) {
 28619:             stopAutoLoadAllVehicles();
 28620:             return false;
 28621:         }
 28622:         if (!document.body) {
 28623:             runtimeListen(document, 'DOMContentLoaded', installAutoLoadAllVehicles, { once: true });
 28624:             return false;
 28625:         }
 28626:         if (!autoLoadAllVehiclesObserver) {
 28627:             const observer = runtimeTrackObserver(new MutationObserver(mutations => {
 28628:                 if (!state.autoLoadAllVehicles) return;
 28629:                 if (autoLoadAllVehiclesMissionRoot && !autoLoadAllVehiclesMissionRoot.isConnected) {
 28630:                     resetAutoLoadAllVehiclesMission();
 28631:                 }
 28632:                 if (autoLoadAllVehiclesActiveLink && !autoLoadAllVehiclesActiveLink.isConnected) {
 28633:                     releaseAutoLoadAllVehiclesRequest({ schedule: false });
 28634:                 }
 28635:                 if (mutations.some(autoLoadAllVehiclesMutationRelevant)) scheduleAutoLoadAllVehiclesScan(AUTO_LOAD_ALL_VEHICLES_SETTLE_MS);
 28636:             }));
 28637:             observer.observe(document.body, { childList: true, subtree: true });

 28671:                 scheduleMarkerStateSync(0, false);
 28672:                 scheduleDeferredOperationalStartup();

 14732:         const hrefSaysBuilding = hrefPaths.some(path => /\/buildings\/\d+/.test(path) || /\/buildings\/?$/.test(path));
 14733:         const hrefSaysMission = hrefPaths.some(path => /\/missions\/\d+/.test(path) || /\/missions\/?$/.test(path));

 14745:         if (explicitMission && !explicitVehicle && !explicitBuilding) return isAllianceMissionSignal(combined) ? 'alliance-mission' : 'my-mission';
 14746: 
 14747:         return 'unknown';
 14748:     }
 14749: 
 14750:     function isAllianceMissionSignal(signal) {
 14751:         return signal.includes('alliance') || signal.includes('shared_mission') || signal.includes('alliance_mission') || signal.includes('verband') || signal.includes('verbandseinsatz') || signal.includes('association');

 16548:     function transportSweepRootScore(root, missionId = null) {
 16549:         if (!root || !root.isConnected) return -1;
 16550:         const anchors = transportSweepVehicleAnchorsWithin(root);
 16551:         if (!anchors.length) return -1;
 16552:         let score = anchors.length * 10;
 16553:         const text = String(root.textContent || '').toLowerCase();
 16554:         if (/mission|incident|einsatz|call/.test(text)) score += 15;
 16555:         if (/patient|transport|ambulance|discharge/.test(text)) score += 30;
 16556:         if (missionId !== null) {
 16557:             try {
 16558:                 if (root.querySelector(`a[href*="/missions/${missionId}"]`)) score += 80;
 16559:             } catch (err) {}
 16560:         }
 16561:         const rect = root.getBoundingClientRect();
 16562:         score += Math.min(30, Math.round((rect.width * rect.height) / 50000));
 16563:         return score;
 16564:     }

 26963:     function makeToggleButton(key, icon, label, title) {
 26964:         return `
 26965:             <button class="mcms-toggle-btn" type="button" data-toggle="${key}" title="${escapeHtml(title || label)}">
 26966:                 <span class="mcms-iconbox">${icon}</span>
 26967:                 <span class="mcms-text">
 26968:                     <span class="mcms-label">${escapeHtml(label)}</span>
 26969:                     <span class="mcms-pill">OFF</span>
 26970:                 </span>
 26971:             </button>
 26972:         `;
 26973:     }

  1422: 
  1423:     function normaliseLoadedState(parsed, base = defaultState()) {
  1424:         const merged = {
  1425:             ...base,
  1426:             ...parsed,
  1427:             nudge: { ...base.nudge, ...(parsed.nudge || {}) },
  1428:             visibility: { ...base.visibility, ...(parsed.visibility || {}) },
  1429:             quickPins: { ...base.quickPins, ...(parsed.quickPins || {}) },
  1430:             coverage: { ...base.coverage, ...(parsed.coverage || {}) },
  1431:             heatmap: { ...base.heatmap, ...(parsed.heatmap || {}) },
  1432:             stuckDetector: { ...base.stuckDetector, ...(parsed.stuckDetector || {}) },
  1433:             missionSpawn: { ...base.missionSpawn, ...(parsed.missionSpawn || {}) },

  1534:         delete merged.requiresAttention;
  1535:         return merged;
  1536:     }
  1537: 
  1538:     function loadState() {
  1539:         const base = defaultState();
  1540:         const raw = localStorage.getItem(SCRIPT.storageState) || SCRIPT.oldStorageKeys.map(key => localStorage.getItem(key)).find(Boolean);
  1541:         if (!raw) return base;
  1542: 
  1543:         try {
  1544:             return normaliseLoadedState(JSON.parse(raw), base);
  1545:         } catch (err) {
  1546:             return base;
  1547:         }
  1548:     }
  1549: 
  1550:     function saveState() {
  1551:         try {
  1552:             localStorage.setItem(SCRIPT.storageState, JSON.stringify(state));
  1553:             localStorage.setItem(SCRIPT.legacyTheme, state.theme);
  1554:             localStorage.setItem(SCRIPT.legacyPosition, state.position);

 14394:     function tabletModeStatusText() {
 14395:         return deviceLayoutStatusText();

 14398:     function refreshTabletModeUi(panel = document.getElementById(SCRIPT.panelId)) {
 14399:         if (!panel) return;
 14400:         panel.classList.toggle('mcms-tablet-active', tabletModeActive);
 14401:         panel.classList.toggle('mcms-mobile-active', mobileModeActive);
 14402:         const tabletSelect = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="tablet-mode"]');
 14403:         const mobileSelect = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="mobile-mode"]');
 14404:         if (tabletSelect && document.activeElement !== tabletSelect) tabletSelect.value = state.tabletMode;
 14405:         if (mobileSelect && document.activeElement !== mobileSelect) mobileSelect.value = state.mobileMode;
 14406:         const status = panel.querySelector('[data-device-layout-status], [data-tablet-status]');
 14407:         if (status) status.textContent = tabletModeStatusText();
 14408:         const dragHandle = panel.querySelector('.mcms-drag-handle');
 14409:         const title = panel.querySelector('.mcms-title');
 14410:         const subtitle = panel.querySelector('.mcms-subtitle');
 14411:         const touchLayout = isTouchLayoutActive();
 14412:         const layoutName = mobileModeActive ? 'MOBILE COMMAND PANEL' : tabletModeActive ? 'TABLET COMMAND PANEL' : '☰ DRAG MENU HERE';

 14398:     function refreshTabletModeUi(panel = document.getElementById(SCRIPT.panelId)) {
 14399:         if (!panel) return;
 14400:         panel.classList.toggle('mcms-tablet-active', tabletModeActive);
 14401:         panel.classList.toggle('mcms-mobile-active', mobileModeActive);

 24410:             throw new Error('Tampermonkey storage is unavailable.');

 24414: 
 24415:     function readDiscordWebhookInput({ save = true } = {}) {
 24416:         const input = document.querySelector(`#${SCRIPT.panelId} [data-setting="discord-webhook"]`);
 24417:         const raw = String(input?.value || getDiscordWebhookUrl()).trim();
 24418:         return save ? saveDiscordWebhookUrl(raw) : normaliseDiscordWebhookUrl(raw);
 24419:     }
 24420: 
 24421:     function setDiscordStatus(message, tone = 'neutral') {
 24422:         discordFinanceStatus = String(message || '');
 24423:         discordFinanceStatusTone = ['neutral', 'good', 'bad', 'busy'].includes(tone) ? tone : 'neutral';
 24424:         const status = document.querySelector(`#${SCRIPT.panelId} [data-discord-status]`);
 24425:         if (status) {
 24426:             status.textContent = discordFinanceStatus;

 26062:         }
 26063:     }
 26064: 
 26065:     function clearDiscordWebhook() {
 26066:         if (!getDiscordWebhookUrl()) {
 26067:             setDiscordStatus('No Discord webhook is currently saved.', 'neutral');
 26068:             return;
 26069:         }
 26070:         if (!pageWindow.confirm('Remove the saved Discord webhook from Tampermonkey storage?')) return;
 26071:         gmDeleteValueSafe(SCRIPT.discordWebhookState);
 26072:         const input = document.querySelector(`#${SCRIPT.panelId} [data-setting="discord-webhook"]`);
 26073:         if (input) input.value = '';
 26074:         setDiscordStatus('Saved Discord webhook removed.', 'good');
 26075:         showToast('Discord webhook cleared');
 26076:     }
 26077: 
 26078: 
 26079:     function setStatus(text) {
 26080:         const status = document.querySelector(`#${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-status`);
 26081:         if (status) status.textContent = text || 'Ready.';
 26082:     }

 27210:                 <div data-transport-sweep></div>
 27211:                 <div class="mcms-status">Manual start only. The sweep excludes your personal vehicle IDs, checks every non-personal FMS 5 patient vehicle in each affected alliance mission, and only clears a vehicle when MissionChief exposes the visible <b>Discharge patient</b> button. Prisoner transports are not included.</div>
 27212:                 <div class="mcms-section-label">Resource Gap Finder</div>

 27217:                 <div class="mcms-status">Resource Gap uses MissionChief's missing-requirement text and performs best-effort matching against your currently available vehicle types. It never selects or dispatches units.</div>
 27218:             </section>

 27257:                 </div>
 27258:                 <div class="mcms-row"><span class="mcms-row-label">Banner style</span><select class="mcms-select" data-setting="payout-template">${buildPayoutTemplateOptions(state.payoutFlash.template)}</select></div>

 27260:                 <div class="mcms-row"><span class="mcms-row-label">Flash duration (sec)</span><input class="mcms-input" type="number" min="2" max="30" step="2" data-setting="payout-duration"></div>
 27261:                 <div class="mcms-row"><span class="mcms-row-label">Sound volume</span><input class="mcms-input" type="range" min="0" max="1" step="0.05" data-setting="payout-volume"></div>

 27263:                 <button class="mcms-small-btn" style="width:100% !important;margin-bottom:8px !important" type="button" data-action="test-payout-flash">Test Emergency Flash</button>
 27264:                 <div class="mcms-status">Vice City Inspired, Bad Company Inspired, Scarface Inspired and Cyberpunk Inspired use hosted cashout MP3s from your public GitHub asset repository. Other templates retain synthesized cues. Enable Theme Audio, set the volume, then use Test Emergency Flash.</div>
 27265:             </section>

  1387:                 distanceOrigin: 'live',
  1388:                 lockedOrigin: null
  1389:             },

  1391:             allianceCredits: false,
  1392:             allianceCreditMinimum: 0,
  1393:             missionAge: false,

  1395:             transportWatcher: true,

  1397:             stuckDetector: { enabled: true, thresholdMin: 20 },

  1399:             resourceGap: { enabled: false, radiusMi: 25 },
  1400:             transportSweep: { delayMs: 2000, maxPerRun: 25 },
  1401:             payoutFlash: { enabled: true, threshold: 10000, durationMs: 4000, template: 'gta5', soundEnabled: false, soundVolume: 0.35 },
  1402:             discordReport: { webhookName: 'MissionChief Finance', topCategories: 5, period: 'today', customStart: localIsoDate(new Date(Date.now() - 6 * 86400000)), customEnd: localIsoDate(), includeChart: true, includeComparison: true, reportMode: 'fullAudit', includeForecast: true, includeRisk: true },

  1404:             profiles: Array.from({ length: MAP_PROFILE_LIMIT }, () => null),
  1405:             nudge: { x: 0, y: 0 },
  1406:             panelPosition: null,

  1475:         merged.missionAgeWatch.valueMode = CRITICAL_VALUE_MODE_KEYS.includes(String(merged.missionAgeWatch.valueMode)) ? String(merged.missionAgeWatch.valueMode) : 'total';
  1476:         merged.missionAgeWatch.distanceOrigin = /^(?:live|locked|quick:[a-z0-9_-]+|bookmark:\d+)$/iu.test(String(merged.missionAgeWatch.distanceOrigin || '')) ? String(merged.missionAgeWatch.distanceOrigin) : 'live';
  1477:         const lockedOrigin = merged.missionAgeWatch.lockedOrigin;
  1478:         merged.missionAgeWatch.lockedOrigin = lockedOrigin && Number.isFinite(Number(lockedOrigin.lat)) && Number.isFinite(Number(lockedOrigin.lng))
  1479:             ? { lat: Number(lockedOrigin.lat), lng: Number(lockedOrigin.lng), label: String(lockedOrigin.label || 'Locked centre').slice(0, 80) }
  1480:             : null;
  1481:         merged.missionLockAudio = merged.missionLockAudio !== false;
  1482:         merged.tabletMode = ['auto', 'on', 'off'].includes(String(merged.tabletMode)) ? String(merged.tabletMode) : 'auto';
  1483:         merged.mobileMode = ['auto', 'on', 'off'].includes(String(merged.mobileMode)) ? String(merged.mobileMode) : 'auto';
  1484:         merged.transportWatcher = merged.transportWatcher !== false;
  1485:         merged.missionInspector = merged.missionInspector !== false;
  1486:         merged.stuckDetector.enabled = merged.stuckDetector.enabled !== false;
  1487:         merged.stuckDetector.thresholdMin = Math.round(clamp(merged.stuckDetector.thresholdMin, STUCK_MIN_MINUTES, STUCK_MAX_MINUTES, 20));
  1488:         merged.missionSpawn.enabled = merged.missionSpawn.enabled !== false;
  1489:         merged.resourceGap.enabled = Boolean(merged.resourceGap.enabled);
  1490:         merged.resourceGap.radiusMi = RESOURCE_GAP_RADIUS_OPTIONS.includes(Number(merged.resourceGap.radiusMi)) ? Number(merged.resourceGap.radiusMi) : 25;
  1491:         merged.transportSweep.delayMs = TRANSPORT_SWEEP_DELAY_OPTIONS.includes(Number(merged.transportSweep.delayMs)) ? Number(merged.transportSweep.delayMs) : 2000;
  1492:         merged.transportSweep.maxPerRun = Math.round(clamp(merged.transportSweep.maxPerRun, 1, TRANSPORT_SWEEP_MAX_REQUESTS, 25));
  1493:         merged.payoutFlash.enabled = merged.payoutFlash.enabled !== false;
  1494:         merged.payoutFlash.threshold = Math.round(clamp(merged.payoutFlash.threshold, 1000, 1000000000, 10000));
  1495:         merged.payoutFlash.durationMs = normalisePayoutFlashDuration(merged.payoutFlash.durationMs);

  1809:         }
  1810:         if (Object.keys(parsedPairs).length) {
  1811:             const formatted = formatMissingRequirementObject(parsedPairs);
  1812:             if (formatted) return formatted;
  1813:         }
  1814: 
  1815:         return text.replace(/^[{\[]+|[}\]]+$/g, '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim();
  1816:     }
  1817: 
  1818:     function removeOldInstances() {
  1819:         document.querySelectorAll(`#${SCRIPT.controlId}, #${SCRIPT.panelId}, #${SCRIPT.toastId}, #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}, #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId}, #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId}, #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId}, #${SCRIPT.missionInspectorId}, #${SCRIPT.helpCenterId}, #${SCRIPT.oldControlId}, #${SCRIPT.cleanExitId}, #${SCRIPT.oldGeoLabelLayerId}`)
  1820:             .forEach(el => el.remove());
  1821: 
  1822:         document.querySelectorAll('style').forEach(style => {
  1823:             const text = style.textContent || '';
  1824:             if (style.id.startsWith('mc-map-command-') || (text.includes('mcms-') && text.includes('data-mc-map-skin'))) {
  1825:                 style.remove();
  1826:             }
  1827:         });
  1828:     }

 16143:     function transportRequirementFromSnapshot(snapshot) {
 16144:         const raw = normaliseMissingRequirementText(snapshot?.missingText);
 16145:         if (!raw) return null;
 16146:         const text = raw.toLowerCase();
 16147:         const transportRequired = [
 16148:             /\btransport(?:ation)?\b.{0,34}\b(?:needed|required|waiting|pending)\b/i,
 16149:             /\b(?:needs?|requires?|awaiting)\b.{0,34}\btransport(?:ation)?\b/i,
 16150:             /\bmust be transported\b/i,

 16170:         if (!count && type === 'prisoner' && prisoners > 1) count = prisoners;
 16171:         count = Math.min(99, Math.max(0, Math.round(count || 0)));
 16172: 
 16173:         return {
 16174:             type,
 16175:             count,
 16176:             label: type === 'patient' ? 'Patient transport required' : type === 'prisoner' ? 'Prisoner transport required' : 'Transport required'
 16177:         };
 16178:     }
 16179: 
 16180:     function transportWatcherSvg(type) {
 16181:         if (type === 'prisoner') {
 16182:             return `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M3.5 8.5h12.2l3.1 3.3v5.1H3.5z" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linejoin="round"/><path d="M15.7 8.5v3.3h3.1M7 11.2v3.2M10 11.2v3.2M13 11.2v3.2" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.55" stroke-linecap="round"/><circle cx="7.1" cy="18" r="1.7" fill="#171008" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.3"/><circle cx="16.4" cy="18" r="1.7" fill="#171008" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.3"/></svg>`;
 16183:         }
 16184:         if (type === 'patient') {
 16185:             return `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M3.5 8.5h11.8l3.7 3.5v4.9H3.5z" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linejoin="round"/><path d="M15.3 8.5V12H19M8.3 10.2v4.3M6.15 12.35h4.3" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.65" stroke-linecap="round"/><circle cx="7.1" cy="18" r="1.7" fill="#171008" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.3"/><circle cx="16.4" cy="18" r="1.7" fill="#171008" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.3"/></svg>`;
 16186:         }
 16187:         return `<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M2.8 8.8h11.9l3.7 3.4v4.7H2.8z" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linejoin="round"/><path d="M14.7 8.8v3.4h3.7M7.4 12.7h5.1M10.8 10.8l2 1.9-2 1.9" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.55" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/><circle cx="6.5" cy="18" r="1.7" fill="#171008" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.3"/><circle cx="15.8" cy="18" r="1.7" fill="#171008" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.3"/></svg>`;
 16188:     }
 16189: 
 16190:     function renderedMissionFloatWidth(label, selector, fallback) {

 16189: 
 16190:     function renderedMissionFloatWidth(label, selector, fallback) {
 16191:         try {
 16192:             const badge = label?._icon?.querySelector?.(selector);
 16193:             const width = Number(badge?.getBoundingClientRect?.().width);
 16194:             if (Number.isFinite(width) && width > 0) return width;
 16195:         } catch (err) {}
 16196:         return fallback;
 16197:     }
 16198: 
 16199:     function transportWatcherPlacement(map, marker, missionId, requirement) {

 16201:         let occupiedWidth = 0;
 16202:         let source = 'marker';

 16208:                 52
 16209:             );

 16244: 
 16245:         return {
 16246:             side,
 16247:             source,
 16248:             horizontalOffset,
 16249:             iconAnchor: [side === 'right' ? -horizontalOffset : horizontalOffset, 18],
 16250:             signature: `${side}:${source}:${horizontalOffset}`
 16251:         };
 16252:     }
 16253: 
 16254:     function makeTransportWatcherIcon(requirement, placement) {

  4176:         html[data-mcms-mobile-active="true"] #${SCRIPT.panelId} .mcms-config-actions { grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr)) !important; gap:7px !important; }

 15047:         let current;
 15048:         try { current = pageWindow.missionMarkerAdd; } catch (err) { return false; }
 15049:         if (typeof current !== 'function') return false;
 15050:         if (current.__mcmsMissionOverlaysWrappedV313) return true;
 15051: 
 15052:         const original = current.__mcmsOriginal || current;
 15053:         const wrapped = function (...args) {
 15054:             args.forEach(captureMissionMarkerData);
 15055:             const result = original.apply(this, args);
 15056:             invalidateMarkerRegistryCaches('mission');
 15057:             handleMissionSpawnArguments(args);
 15058:             scheduleEnabledMapRefreshes({ includeSnapshots: true, positionPanel: false });
 15059:             return result;
 15060:         };
 15061: 
 15062:         try {
 15063:             Object.defineProperty(wrapped, '__mcmsMissionOverlaysWrappedV313', { value: true });
 15064:             Object.defineProperty(wrapped, '__mcmsOriginal', { value: original });
 15065:             pageWindow.missionMarkerAdd = wrapped;
 15066:             if (pageWindow.missionMarkerAdd !== wrapped) return false;
 15067:             runtime.hookRestorers.push(() => {

 17759:             state.missionInspector || state.stuckDetector.enabled || criticalViewActive ||
 17760:             document.getElementById(SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId)?.classList?.contains('mcms-open') ||
 17761:             document.getElementById(SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId)?.classList?.contains('mcms-open') ||
 17762:             transportSweepRuntime.running
 17763:         );
 17764:     }
 17765: 
 17766:     function missionSnapshotsNeeded() {
 17767:         return Boolean(
 17768:             state.payoutFlash.enabled || state.transportWatcher || state.stuckDetector.enabled ||
 17769:             state.missionSpawn.enabled || state.allianceCredits || state.missionAge ||
 17770:             state.unitCommitment || state.resourceGap.enabled || state.majorIncidentFeed.enabled || criticalViewActive ||
 17771:             operationalUiIsVisible() || missionInspectorMarker
 17772:         );
 17773:     }
 17774: 
 17775:     function isToolkitLeafletLayer(layer) {
 17776:         return Boolean(layer && (
 17777:             layer.__mcmsHeatmapCell || layer.__mcmsHeatmapLayer ||
 17778:             layer.__mcmsCoverageRing || layer.__mcmsCoverageLayer ||
 17779:             layer.__mcmsAllianceCreditLabel || layer.__mcmsAllianceCreditLayer ||

 17775:     function isToolkitLeafletLayer(layer) {
 17776:         return Boolean(layer && (
 17777:             layer.__mcmsHeatmapCell || layer.__mcmsHeatmapLayer ||
 17778:             layer.__mcmsCoverageRing || layer.__mcmsCoverageLayer ||
 17779:             layer.__mcmsAllianceCreditLabel || layer.__mcmsAllianceCreditLayer ||
 17780:             layer.__mcmsMissionAgeLabel || layer.__mcmsMissionAgeLayer ||
 17781:             layer.__mcmsUnitCommitmentLabel || layer.__mcmsUnitCommitmentLayer ||
 17782:             layer.__mcmsTransportWatcherLabel || layer.__mcmsTransportWatcherLayer ||
 17783:             layer.__mcmsResourceGapLabel || layer.__mcmsResourceGapLayer ||
 17784:             layer.__mcmsStuckMissionLabel || layer.__mcmsStuckMissionLayer ||
 17785:             layer.__mcmsMissionSpawnLabel || layer.__mcmsMissionSpawnRing || layer.__mcmsMissionSpawnLayer ||
 17786:             layer.__mcmsMissionLockOnMarker || layer.__mcmsMissionLockOnLayer
 17787:         ));
 17788:     }
 17789: 
 17790:     let enabledMapRefreshTimer = null;
 17791:     let pendingEnabledMapRefresh = { includeSnapshots: false, positionPanel: false, refreshOperational: false, fullRefresh: false };
 17792: 
 17793:     function flushEnabledMapRefreshes() {
 17794:         enabledMapRefreshTimer = null;
 17795:         if (runtime.destroyed) return;

 19331:         const previousSnapshots = liveMissionSnapshots;
 19332:         const missionMarkers = getMissionMarkerIndex().markers;
 19333:         for (const marker of missionMarkers) {
 19334:             const snapshot = missionSnapshotFromMarker(marker, now);
 19335:             if (!snapshot) continue;
 19336:             updateMissionProgressState(snapshot, now);
 19337:             current.set(snapshot.missionId, snapshot);
 19338:             missionLifecycleLastSeen.set(snapshot.missionId, now);
 19339:             const newlySeen = !knownMissionIds.has(snapshot.missionId);
 19340:             knownMissionIds.add(snapshot.missionId);
 19341:             if (newlySeen && missionSpawnArmed && state.missionSpawn.enabled) runtimeSetTimeout(() => animateMissionSpawn(snapshot.missionId), 60);
 19342:         }
 19343: 
 19344:         if (missionSnapshotReady) {
 19345:             for (const [missionId, previous] of previousSnapshots.entries()) {
 19346:                 if (current.has(missionId)) continue;
 19347:                 if (now - Number(previous.lastSeen || now) > 15000) continue;
 19348:                 if (!recentCompletedMissions.some(item => item.missionId === missionId && now - item.removedAt < PAYOUT_MATCH_WINDOW_MS)) {
 19349:                     recentCompletedMissions.unshift({ ...previous, removedAt: now, matched: false });
 19350:                 }
 19351:             }

 22043:         }
 22044:         const id = normaliseMissionId(payload.id ?? payload.mission_id ?? payload.missionId);
 22045:         if (id !== null) target.add(id);
 22046:         for (const key of ['params', 'mission', 'data']) {
 22047:             const nested = payload[key];
 22048:             if (nested && typeof nested === 'object') extractMissionIdsFromPayload(nested, target, seen);
 22049:         }
 22050:         return target;
 22051:     }
 22052: 
 22053:     function animateMissionSpawn(missionId, attempt = 0) {
 22054:         const marker = getMissionMarkerIndex().byId.get(missionId) || null;
 22055:         if (!marker) {
 22056:             if (attempt < 4) runtimeSetTimeout(() => animateMissionSpawn(missionId, attempt + 1), 120 + attempt * 120);
 22057:             return;
 22058:         }
 22059:         const map = findLeafletMapInstance(false);
 22060:         if (!map || !pageWindow.L) return;
 22061:         let latLng = null;
 22062:         try { latLng = marker.getLatLng?.() || null; } catch (err) {}
 22063:         if (!latLng) return;

 22046:         for (const key of ['params', 'mission', 'data']) {
 22047:             const nested = payload[key];
 22048:             if (nested && typeof nested === 'object') extractMissionIdsFromPayload(nested, target, seen);
 22049:         }
 22050:         return target;
 22051:     }
 22052: 
 22053:     function animateMissionSpawn(missionId, attempt = 0) {
 22054:         const marker = getMissionMarkerIndex().byId.get(missionId) || null;
 22055:         if (!marker) {
 22056:             if (attempt < 4) runtimeSetTimeout(() => animateMissionSpawn(missionId, attempt + 1), 120 + attempt * 120);
 22057:             return;
 22058:         }
 22059:         const map = findLeafletMapInstance(false);
 22060:         if (!map || !pageWindow.L) return;
 22061:         let latLng = null;
 22062:         try { latLng = marker.getLatLng?.() || null; } catch (err) {}
 22063:         if (!latLng) return;
 22064: 
 22065:         marker._icon?.classList?.add('mcms-mission-spawn-focus');
 22066:         const personal = isPersonalMissionLayer(marker, missionId);

 22058:         }
 22059:         const map = findLeafletMapInstance(false);
 22060:         if (!map || !pageWindow.L) return;
 22061:         let latLng = null;
 22062:         try { latLng = marker.getLatLng?.() || null; } catch (err) {}
 22063:         if (!latLng) return;
 22064: 
 22065:         marker._icon?.classList?.add('mcms-mission-spawn-focus');
 22066:         const personal = isPersonalMissionLayer(marker, missionId);
 22067:         const group = pageWindow.L.layerGroup();
 22068:         group.__mcmsMissionSpawnLayer = true;
 22069:         try {
 22070:             const ring = state.economyMode ? null : pageWindow.L.circleMarker(latLng, {
 22071:                 radius: 10, interactive: false, bubblingMouseEvents: false,
 22072:                 className: 'mcms-mission-spawn-ring', pane: 'overlayPane'
 22073:             });
 22074:             const pane = ensureMissionFloatPane(map) || 'markerPane';
 22075:             const label = pageWindow.L.marker(latLng, {
 22076:                 interactive: false, keyboard: false, bubblingMouseEvents: false, pane,
 22077:                 icon: pageWindow.L.divIcon({
 22078:                     className: 'mcms-mission-spawn-label-icon',

 22074:             const pane = ensureMissionFloatPane(map) || 'markerPane';
 22075:             const label = pageWindow.L.marker(latLng, {
 22076:                 interactive: false, keyboard: false, bubblingMouseEvents: false, pane,
 22077:                 icon: pageWindow.L.divIcon({
 22078:                     className: 'mcms-mission-spawn-label-icon',
 22079:                     html: `<span class="mcms-mission-spawn-label${personal ? '' : ' mcms-alliance-text'}">${personal ? 'NEW INCIDENT' : 'NEW ALLIANCE INCIDENT'}</span>`,
 22080:                     iconSize: [0, 0], iconAnchor: [0, 34]
 22081:                 })
 22082:             });
 22083:             if (ring) {
 22084:                 ring.__mcmsMissionSpawnRing = true;
 22085:                 ring.addTo(group);
 22086:             }
 22087:             label.__mcmsMissionSpawnLabel = true;
 22088:             label.addTo(group);
 22089:             group.addTo(map);
 22090:         } catch (err) {}
 22091:         runtimeSetTimeout(() => {
 22092:             marker._icon?.classList?.remove('mcms-mission-spawn-focus');
 22093:             try { group.clearLayers(); group.remove(); } catch (err) {}
 22094:         }, state.economyMode ? Math.min(1600, MISSION_SPAWN_DURATION_MS) : MISSION_SPAWN_DURATION_MS);

 22077:                 icon: pageWindow.L.divIcon({
 22078:                     className: 'mcms-mission-spawn-label-icon',
 22079:                     html: `<span class="mcms-mission-spawn-label${personal ? '' : ' mcms-alliance-text'}">${personal ? 'NEW INCIDENT' : 'NEW ALLIANCE INCIDENT'}</span>`,
 22080:                     iconSize: [0, 0], iconAnchor: [0, 34]
 22081:                 })
 22082:             });
 22083:             if (ring) {
 22084:                 ring.__mcmsMissionSpawnRing = true;
 22085:                 ring.addTo(group);
 22086:             }
 22087:             label.__mcmsMissionSpawnLabel = true;
 22088:             label.addTo(group);
 22089:             group.addTo(map);
 22090:         } catch (err) {}
 22091:         runtimeSetTimeout(() => {
 22092:             marker._icon?.classList?.remove('mcms-mission-spawn-focus');
 22093:             try { group.clearLayers(); group.remove(); } catch (err) {}
 22094:         }, state.economyMode ? Math.min(1600, MISSION_SPAWN_DURATION_MS) : MISSION_SPAWN_DURATION_MS);
 22095:     }
 22096: 
 22097:     function handleMissionSpawnArguments(args) {

### currency · 0 matches
### Intl.NumberFormat · 0 matches
